name: earthquake_code_grandfather_school_evacuation_order
premise: Mayor Alex Rivera must order evacuation of Riverside Elementary before a predicted aftershock even though the building passed visual inspection yesterday. Structural engineer Nico Grant warns pre-1980 soft-story wings were grandfathered under old codes and may fail in a M6.5 aftershock. Evacuating sends twelve hundred students into freezing rain without enough buses; shelter-in-place keeps warmth but concentrates children in possibly vulnerable wings. Parents' WhatsApp groups are already contradictory; the district superintendent asks for a single legal directive in forty minutes. Parents are receiving automated evacuation texts, and the superintendent has to justify the call to keep students in place or move them into compromised roads.

agents.name: Alex Rivera
agents.identity: I am the mayor responsible for activating emergency orders, liability exposure, and clear communication when geologists disagree on aftershock probability. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want children out of plausible collapse zones without causing hypothermia and traffic chaos if the aftershock never arrives. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

agents.name: Nico Grant
agents.identity: I am a licensed structural engineer who reviewed grandfathered soft-story retrofits and found partial column jacketing still pending funding. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want mandatory evacuation until jacketing completes because professional ethics do not let me sign comfort on uncertain lateral systems. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

choices: I will order full evacuation to regional gyms with National Guard buses prioritized for youngest grades, accepting weather exposure and parent panic if roads ice.

I will order shelter-in-place in retrofitted gym wings only and cancel classes in soft-story wings with bussed relocation for those rooms, accepting partial footprint risk if aftershock exceeds design assumptions.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The county emergency manager needs Alex Rivera's signature before buses deploy. Alex Rivera must choose between full evacuation or partial shelter-in-place with targeted moves. What does Alex Rivera do?
